title: [VCOPS-76551] - Stop collection in password management tests
body:
## Change Description 
We want to run our password management tests with collection on adapters stopped. 

Adding a step at the begining of the test to stop collection on adapters before running the password management tests. 

We query for adapters of the following kind and then stop collection on these adapters : 

VcfAdapter
VMWARE
NSXTAdapter
VirtualAndPhysicalSANAdapter

These are the adapters found on starting state setup. 

Test is passing and stopping collection on adapters as expected 

https://uts-logs.lvn.broadcom.net/user-logs/mops-test/5672326/5fb0544e-6699-42eb-aeb6-f5bc89bc532c/test_driver_log.txt

`   [testng] 04-14@00:57:02 INFO  (AdapterMonitoringStopTest.java:109)  [] - ===== AdapterMonitoringStopTest summary =====
   [testng] 04-14@00:57:02 INFO  (AdapterMonitoringStopTest.java:110)  [] - Stopped successfully (200): 4
   [testng] 04-14@00:57:02 INFO  (AdapterMonitoringStopTest.java:112)  [] -   [STOPPED] VcfAdapter:3737a19d-ccf8-426b-a021-1c56b8e3ec85
   [testng] 04-14@00:57:02 INFO  (AdapterMonitoringStopTest.java:112)  [] -   [STOPPED] NSXTAdapter:7f53a287-567a-4c32-b917-639476371b39
   [testng] 04-14@00:57:02 INFO  (AdapterMonitoringStopTest.java:112)  [] -   [STOPPED] VirtualAndPhysicalSANAdapter:81479006-e89f-4ec1-a38b-5e47a522c437
   [testng] 04-14@00:57:02 INFO  (AdapterMonitoringStopTest.java:112)  [] -   [STOPPED] VMWARE:67586384-809d-45e7-b4d6-b9ea3199f360
   [testng] 04-14@00:57:02 INFO  (AdapterMonitoringStopTest.java:121)  [] - ===== AdapterMonitoringStopTest completed =====`

## Change Tracking ID 
_Don't remove or modify the keyword! MR will not be approved without Valid Jira ID_  

Jira ID:  VCOPS-76551


## Auto-merge. 
_When the change is targeted to the particular release branch only, Auto-merge parameter should be changed to no._  

- Auto-merge: yes  

## Pipeline parameters ##

⚪ __DRAFT PR__

```
draft_enable_ci: false                     ℹ️ Enable/Disable Pipeline
draft_enable_coverity_check: false         ℹ️ Enable/Disable Coverity checker
draft_enable_copyright_check: false        ℹ️ Enable/Disable Copyright checker
draft_enable_per_commit_incremental: false ℹ️ Enable/Disable PR Per-commit incremental build
draft_enable_module_test_mapping: false    ℹ️ Enable/Disable dynamic test selection
draft_ignore_mps: true                     ℹ️ Exclude not effected MP's from the pipeline
draft_enable_Ops_FSS: []                   ℹ️ Enable FSS for tests in the pipeline
draft_disable_Ops_FSS: []                  ℹ️ Disable FSS for tests in the pipeline
draft_run_additional_tests: [VCFPasswordManagement]             ℹ️ Add additional test(s) Example: run_additional_tests: [Backend, Policy]
```

🟢 __NON DRAFT PR__

```
ignore_mps: true                           ℹ️ Exclude not effected MP's from the pipeline
enable_Ops_FSS: []                         ℹ️ Enable FSS for tests in the pipeline
disable_Ops_FSS: []                        ℹ️ Disable FSS for tests in the pipeline
run_additional_tests: [VCFPasswordManagement]                   ℹ️ Add additional test(s) e.x.: run_additional_tests: [Backend, Policy]
```

AI-Assisted (%): 100.00

files.patch:
@@ -28,6 +28,14 @@
     <parameter name="vcf-nsx-audit-username" value="audit"/>
     <parameter name="vcf-nsx-audit-password" value="VMware123!VMware123!"/>
     <parameter name="vcf-monitoring-interval" value="1"/>
+
+    <!-- Stops collection on selected adapter kinds before other tests (reduces load during password workflows) -->
+    <test name="AdapterMonitoringPrecheck" group-by-instances="true" preserve-order="true">
+        <classes>
+            <class name="com.vmware.vropsqa.test.AdapterMonitoringStopTest"/>
+        </classes>
+    </test>
+
     <test name="CollectCycleOverride" group-by-instances="true" preserve-order="true">
         <classes>
             <class name="com.vmware.vropsqa.test.CollectCycleOverrideTest"/>
